summary: Tested Strategy Marketplace Featured Strategies feature. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. 3 featured strategies (Alpha Momentum BTC, ETH Reversal Sniper, SOL Breakout Pulse) display correctly with full metadata including risk labels, performance metrics (sharpe_ratio, win_rate, max_drawdown, total_return). View Strategy and Copy Strategy buttons work correctly. Frontend handles missing/invalid strategy IDs gracefully without crashing.
critical_code_review_comments: FeaturedStrategies component in LandingPage.jsx correctly fetches from /api/marketplace/featured and renders gracefully if API fails (returns null)
StrategyDetailPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Copy Strategy button correctly requires authentication and creates draft copy with '(Copy)' suffix
Risk labels display with appropriate color coding (Medium=amber, Medium-High=orange, High=red)
Performance metrics (_perf) properly enriched in /featured endpoint response
seed_data_creation: 3 featured strategies seeded via seed_strategies.py: Alpha Momentum BTC (9ff5661a-e5a1-483b-bcf1-e3484ea72b7e), ETH Reversal Sniper (ce84d244-1659-444d-b41e-f030cfc5f5c4), SOL Breakout Pulse (6af36c43-4600-4356-8595-da62a369cc1a)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 tested Strategy Marketplace Featured Strategies. All 3 seeded strategies display on landing page with full performance data. Strategy detail pages at /marketplace/{id} show name, description, risk label, category, performance block, parameters, and Copy Strategy button. Copy endpoint requires auth and creates draft copy. Frontend gracefully handles invalid strategy IDs showing 'Strategy not found' message.

tests_executed.test: GET /api/health returns healthy
GET /api/marketplace/featured returns 200
GET /api/marketplace/featured returns 3 strategies
Featured strategies have _perf data with sharpe_ratio, win_rate, max_drawdown, total_return
Featured strategies have risk_labels (Medium, Medium-High, High)
Featured strategies are published, public, and featured=true
GET /api/marketplace/strategies returns 200 and includes featured strategies
GET /api/marketplace/strategies/{id} returns full detail with performance, signals, reviews
Strategy detail has correct performance metrics
Strategy detail has risk_label
Strategy detail returns 404 for invalid ID
POST /api/marketplace/strategies/{id}/copy requires auth (401/403)
POST /api/marketplace/strategies/{id}/copy creates copy with (Copy) suffix
Copy returns 404 for invalid strategy ID
GET /api/market/live-prices returns 200
Login works with test credentials
Landing page loads with hero section
Featured Strategies section (data-testid='featured-strategies-section') renders
3 featured strategy cards display with names, risk labels, metrics
View Strategy buttons navigate to /marketplace/{id}
Strategy detail page shows name, description, risk label, performance, parameters
Copy Strategy button visible for authenticated users
Copy Strategy button shows success toast
Invalid strategy ID shows 'Strategy not found' (no crash)
Navigation links (Home, Leaderboard, Pricing) work

mocked_apis.note: As per main agent context - Binance Testnet orders are simulated
